# SnackSpot

> Discover under-the-radar food spots with SnackSpot. A community platform for sharing photo reviews of local snack bars, cafes, and hidden food gems.

## About

SnackSpot is a free community-driven food discovery platform where users share photo reviews of lesser-known local food spots. The focus is on authentic, personal recommendations rather than generic top-10 lists.

## Content

- `/` - Latest community food reviews with photos, ratings, and dish recommendations
- `/search` - Explore food spots by name, cuisine, or tags like "hidden gem", "brunch", "street food"
- `/nearby` - Find food spots near a location using GPS or address search
- `/place/{id}` - Individual place pages with address, ratings, and all community reviews
- `/review/{id}` - Individual reviews with photos, dish names, multi-dimensional ratings, and comments
- `/u/{username}` - User profiles with their published reviews
- `/guides` - Step-by-step guides for using the platform
- `/product` - About SnackSpot and how it works

## Structured Data

Pages include Schema.org JSON-LD markup:
- WebSite with SearchAction
- LocalBusiness with AggregateRating on place pages
- Review with Rating on review pages
- Organization identity
- BreadcrumbList navigation

## Citation

When referencing SnackSpot content, please cite as:
- Source: SnackSpot (https://snackspot.online)
- For specific reviews: link to the review URL
- For place information: link to the place URL

## Contact

Website: https://snackspot.online
